description_long: This object is a rectangular stone block with a distinctive pattern of alternating dark and light horizontal stripes across its top surface. The stripes are evenly spaced and run parallel to the longer edge, creating a visually striking, almost industrial appearance. The sides of the block are solid black, giving it a bold, monolithic look. The top surface appears to be made of a polished or semi-polished stone, possibly granite or marble, with the lighter stripes showing a subtle marbled texture. The block is thick and robust, suggesting it is designed to serve as a barrier or obstacle in an urban environment. There are no visible engravings, markings, or interactive components on its exterior.
description: A thick, rectangular stone block with alternating dark and light horizontal stripes on top and solid black sides, giving it a bold, modern look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the horizontal striped pattern running left to right, with the block's solid black face visible below.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the stripes running front to back, emphasizing the block's depth and the same solid black side.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, with horizontal stripes and a solid black lower section.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing stripes running front to back and the solid black side.
attribute_location_context: urban sidewalk or plaza as a decorative barrier or seating element
attribute_installation_method: set in concrete or on a prepared foundation
attribute_weathering_pattern: No visible weathering; the surfaces appear clean and well-maintained, with no chips or erosion.
attribute_integration_with_surrounding_s: isolated or spaced as part of a row of similar blocks
